title: Richly Garlicky French Chicken Bake
description: A crowd-pleasing French dish featuring kabse spice and a richly garlicky flavor, baked to perfection in a claypot.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the kabse spice, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
In a large claypot, arrange the chicken thighs in a single layer.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chicken and sprinkle the spice mixture evenly over the top.
Add the minced garlic to the claypot, scattering it around the chicken.
Pour in the chicken broth, making sure that the chicken is mostly submerged.
Cover the claypot with a lid and bake for 45 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened into a glassy jelly.
If using xanthan gum, stir it in during the last 10 minutes of cooking to enhance the jelly-like texture.
Remove the claypot from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
